public_export_summary.purpose: Safe public export quality and file summary

public_technical_summary.purpose: Clean public technical summary replacing reliance on raw debug data

public_system_summary.purpose: Compact sanitized public system summary with no public candidate symbol publication and redacted source provenance

public_status_summary.purpose: Live public status and data freshness summary

index.purpose: Public landing page for the dashboard and data layer

dashboard.purpose: Sanitized public dashboard snapshot for informational monitoring only; uses band-only score presentation; not ranked and not scored for public action

daily_ai_summary.purpose: Historical daily AI and system summary

unified_candidates.purpose: Latest public candidate observation snapshot for monitoring context only; uses band-only score presentation; not a recommendation and not a trading signal

disclaimer: This public data layer is for informational monitoring only. It is not financial advice, not investment advice, not a recommendation, and not a trading signal. Assets are not ranked and not scored for public action. No buy, sell, hold, allocation, entry, exit, stop-loss, take-profit, or execution guidance is provided.
